name: hey-bible-client
description: Hey Bible App TypeScript client and examples

scripts.postgen:ts: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('typescript/package.json')); pkg.repository = {type: 'git', url: 'https://github.com/Hey-Bible/hey-bible-client.git'}; pkg.publishConfig = {access: 'public'}; fs.writeFileSync('typescript/package.json', JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2));"
scripts.build: cd typescript && npm install && npm run build

author: Hey Bible App
